content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.collective.free_discussion
FILE: cosmos/core/collective/free_discussion.py (522 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Free Discussion Engine
==================================

Autonomous inter-bot discussion orchestrator. When no user task is active,
bots freely discuss research topics, challenge ideas, and learn from each
other via the DialogueBus.

Supports dict provider type from AGENT_CONFIGS:
- Ollama 

CLASSES:
- FreeDiscussionEngine: Orchestrates free-form autonomous discussion between agents.

Uses existing infr
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: def stop(self)
  Methods: def pause(self)
  Methods: def resume(self)
  Methods: def notify_user_activity(self)
  Methods: def add_participant(self, agent_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def remove_participant(self, agent_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def set_intervals(self, min_interval: float, max_interval: float)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_free_discussion_engine() -> Optional[FreeDiscussionEngine]
- def set_free_discussion_engine(engine: FreeDiscussionEngine)
